notes: Casa Green (Bukit Jalil) is marketed on portals as a condominium / serviced residence rather than a literal flat; I used comparable whole-unit rentals only and excluded room-only/bedspace listings. I deduplicated one obvious cross-portal duplicate RM1,700 ad that appeared on both iProperty and Mudah. The current live samples found cluster between RM1,350 and RM2,500 per month.
